creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
The most shocking thing about Harry Potter Studios in London is that it’s not actually in London 😅  But the most devastating thing is when you promised your kids that you’d visit the Studios on your trip to London, but tickets have now sold out… 💔👇

Over the years, I’ve received countless emails from readers of my London travel blog posts who wanted to visit Harry Potter Studios on their anticipated UK trip, but tickets had already sold out…   So, please, guys - if you want to visit the Studios where they shot a lot of the Harry Potter films, make sure you book tickets as soon as you know when you are in London 🙌  If you want a link to the fully guided “behind-the-scenes” tour I was on, DM or comment “HPLINK”, and I’ll send you the link ✌️  #harrypotterstudios #londontravel #warnerbrosstudiotour #harrypotterworld

transcription.text: Five things I wish I knew before visiting Harry Potter Studios in London. If you're a massive Harry Potter fan, I really recommend that you splurge and book the VIP behind-the-scenes guided tour of the studios. That way you'll skip the lines and you'll have your own guide who can show and tell you so much more than if you just get a stand-up ticket. It's not an amusement park. I think they've done a really good job of making the whole experience pretty interactive, but it is still just a place where you walk through the sets from the Harry Potter movies. You need to book way in advance because tickets are always sold out, like every day is fully booked. So make sure you book the earliest possible time slot because the studios get ramped to the point where I actually think they should consider limiting the number of people they let in. You can't just take the tube to the studios. The studios are actually outside of London in a small town about an hour's drive north of London.
